top_10_improvements: Align v1.1.0 release docs with the actual tag/current release-doc commit or clearly distinguish restructure commit from release tag commit.
Protect FORCE_APP_DIRECTORY from accidental private metadata commits and move external project path notes to an ignored local pointer workflow.
Add a repeatable local safety/link/path validation command or script.
Deepen metadata coverage for Flow, Process Builder, reports, dashboards, email templates, custom labels, translations, Experience Cloud, and static resources.
Add Apex CRUD/FLS, sharing, user-mode, and security-enforcement patterns.
Add Apex selector/query-service guidance and examples.
Add LWC UI API wire adapter and lightning-record-edit-form guidance.
Add Lightning Web Security, static resource, and third-party JavaScript runtime constraints.
Update prompt and checklist controls to require git status/diff review before edits when a git repo exists.
Separate current reusable Memory facts from historical one-time status notes.
recommended_next_action: Run the P0 follow-up prompt from WORKSPACE/DEEP_REPO_QUALITY_AUDIT.md to fix release commit consistency and FORCE_APP_DIRECTORY safety guardrails before heavier public promotion.
